title: Need someone to help out with setting up our Workflows
excerpt:
Hi! 
Can anybody point me to someone who is an expert on setting up workflows for our Real Estate business?

posts.author: AuraHagoriles (Aura)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
Can anybody point me to someone who is an expert on setting up workflows for our Real Estate business?
We are in the process of migrating from another tool into Monday.com
Please contact me if you or someone you know is interested.
Thank you so much.

posts.author: Fruition (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AuraHagoriles,

We’re a certified Monday.com partner and specialise in real estate listing sales CRM and property management solutions

You can see more information and enquire through our Fruition website to book in a meeting/demo

Looking forward to sharing how we can help!

Josh
Director, fruition

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AuraHagoriles

You are in the right place to find the specialist. My name is Elena and I’m the founder of Kick Consulting, monday.com’s Australian partner. We’ve worked with several real estate companies to streamline their CRM, property listing, sales and management.

What platform are you moving from? If you would like to see examples of the solutions we’ve implemented for other Real Estate businesses, please book straight in :).

Merry Christmas and happy new year.

Elena Korolkova

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @AuraHagoriles ,

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 6 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

We have worked with a number of real estate businesses in the past, helping them set up clearly defined and easy-to-manage processes and optimize their workflows according to monday best practices. We also have done a great amount of migrations from other tools into monday.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements and see if we are the right fit for you!

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: AuraHagoriles (Aura)
posts.cookedHtml:
Alright, I’ll check on it.
Thank you!

posts.author: AuraHagoriles (Aura)
posts.cookedHtml:
Alright, I’ll confirm with my team for the schedule.
Thank you!

posts.author: AuraHagoriles (Aura)
posts.cookedHtml: We are currently using Top Producer CRM.

posts.author: Colin2 (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Aura,
If you are still on the lookout to hire someone, I would be glad to help you out as what you are wanting done is within my skillset
You can reach out to me on my email here
Colin

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AuraHagoriles!

Thanks for choosing monday.com for workflow management! From regular checklists to multi-phase project roadmaps, pre-built workflow templates in monday.com help you stay on track and reduce wasted time and effort. By setting up efficient workflows, you can minimize the amount of time required to accomplish your projects, freeing up more time for other activities. Similarly, you can migrate projects, tasks, and related data from traditional PM systems to the monday.com database, thereby leveraging Cloud capabilities with ease.

If you’re seeking assistance in creating exclusive workflows and data migration, hiring monday.com consultants is the right choice. They can help in standardizing workflows and decreasing your project headaches.
